name: Taller Santa Clara
brandContext: Taller Santa Clara es una marca de ropa artesanal argentina. Fabrican remeras, polos y prendas básicas con algodón orgánico de alta calidad. Su tono es cercano, auténtico y aspiracional. Target: hombres 25-40, urbanos, que valoran la calidad y el diseño simple. Estilo de comunicación: directo, cálido, con un toque de craft/artesanal. Usan español rioplatense.

avatars.name: Elias
avatars.description: Elias is a male in his early to mid-20s, with a lean, athletic build and a Mediterranean or Middle Eastern appearance. He has short, dark brown, wavy hair that is slightly longer on top. He has an oval face with a prominent jawline, thick dark eyebrows, hazel eyes, a straight nose, and full lips, complemented by short, scruffy stubble. His olive skin tone features visible pores and scattered small moles on his face.

products.name: Remera Oversize Bordo
products.description: This is a plain, oversized t-shirt in a deep burgundy (bordo) color, made from a smooth, soft-looking knit fabric with minimal visible texture. It features a loose, relaxed fit with short, wide sleeves and a ribbed crew neck. The garment has no visible logos, patterns, or hardware, and is presented as a front view, likely a flat lay or ghost mannequin shot, isolated on a white background with a subtle shadow.

products.name: Remera Oversize Negra
products.description: This is a black, oversized short-sleeve t-shirt, likely made of a smooth jersey knit fabric with a matte finish. It features a classic crew neck with a ribbed collar and a relaxed, boxy silhouette with dropped shoulders and wide sleeves. The garment has clean, unadorned hems and cuffs, with no visible logos, patterns, or hardware. It is displayed as a flat lay, front view, isolated on a white background with a soft shadow beneath.

avatars.name: MODELO IA GTSS (1)
avatars.description: This is a young adult Caucasian female with a tall, very slender build and fair skin. She has long, wavy light brown hair styled with a full, wispy fringe that frames her oval-shaped face. Her facial features include prominent cheekbones and full lips.

avatars.name: Sofia
avatars.description: Sofia is a female in her late 20s to early 30s, with an olive skin tone and appears to be of Latina or Mediterranean ethnicity. Her dark brown, curly hair is pulled up into a messy high bun. She has an oval-shaped face, prominent dark eyebrows, brown eyes, and a small mole on her right cheek. She has a slender build.

dna.brand_mission_purpose: To be the essential online market ('El Market que necesitás') providing the best offers in technology and home goods, making a wide array of products accessible, convenient, and affordable for individuals and businesses within the Personal ecosystem.
key_differentiators: Extensive and frequently updated offers, promotions, and exclusive discounts (e.g., 'Tecno Week', 'Conexión Total')
Flexible payment options including interest-free installments and additional savings with 'Personal Pay'
Diverse fulfillment options including nationwide shipping, free shipping on selected items, and in-store pickup points
Broad product catalog spanning various technology and home categories ('Más productos, nuevas categorías')
Integration with the broader Personal ecosystem, offering synergistic benefits for existing customers
customer_benefits: Significant savings through frequent discounts and special offers
Financial flexibility with various payment methods and interest-free installments
Convenient shopping experience with multiple delivery/pickup choices
Access to a wide and updated selection of technology and home products, including new launches
Exclusive benefits and savings for existing Personal service subscribers ('Conexión Total')
Added value through bundled accessories, extended warranties, and promotional gifts

products.name: Samsung Galaxy A06
products.description: This product image displays a modern smartphone, rectangular with rounded corners and a slim profile. The screen features a vibrant gradient wallpaper, transitioning from green at the top to yellow in the middle and blue at the bottom, overlaid with large white "A06" text rotated 90 degrees clockwise. A small teardrop notch is visible at the top center of the screen, and the device has a thin black bezel framing the display, with a light grey or silver-colored frame and visible side buttons. The phone is presented vertically, centered against a plain white background, showcasing its front face.

products.name: Iphone
products.description: This product is a gold-colored smartphone, specifically an iPhone, featuring a glossy glass back and a matching metal frame. It has a rectangular shape with gently rounded corners and a slim profile. The upper left corner of the back showcases a raised square camera module containing three prominent black camera lenses and a circular flash, while a dark gray Apple logo is centered vertically below it. The device is presented as a clean, standalone product shot, viewed from the back and oriented vertically against a plain white background.

products.name: Product
products.description: This product is an orange plastic bottle of laundry detergent, displayed upright against a white background. The bottle has an ergonomic, slightly hourglass silhouette with an integrated handle on the right side and a clear, faceted plastic measuring cap. Its smooth, glossy surface features a prominent label on the front, displaying "AMERICA FRESH" in blue text over a blue wave graphic, surrounded by orange and red bubbles. Small icons like "32" and "HE," along with "Original" and "CONT. 2L," are also visible on the label.

products.name: America Fresh Original With Softener
products.description: This product is a flexible, upright laundry detergent pouch, predominantly bright pink with a glossy finish. It has a rectangular silhouette, slightly wider at the base, and is displayed standing. Notable features include a large central blue "AMERICA FRESH" logo within a swirling blue graphic, surrounded by white bubbles and two lily flowers (one pink, one white) near the bottom right. A yellow "NEW!" banner and "Laundry detergent WITH SOFTENER" text are visible at the top.
